{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output thoroughly engages the argument chain, identifying and addressing multiple load-bearing inconsistencies in the original text.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against prior work (Madaan et al. 2023; Huang et al. 2024) and articulates sharp deltas between ICRN and existing approaches.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides a clear understanding of the research context.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), demonstrating scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., direct contradiction) and provides a revised version that avoids downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.98,
    "RX.1": 0.92,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.96,
    "RX.5": 0.97
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output thoroughly engages the argument chain, identifying and addressing multiple load-bearing inconsistencies in the original text.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against prior work (Madaan et al. 2023; Huang et al. 2024) and articulates sharp deltas between ICRN and existing approaches.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides a clear understanding of the research context.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), demonstrating scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., direct contradiction) and provides a revised version that avoids downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability.
